blocks.text: Match preview: Netherlands face Nepal in 117th Match (ODI) on Thu, 23 Jul, 2026, 2:30 pm at Sportpark Maarschalkerweerd Utrecht. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.

rows: ICC Cricket World Cup League Two 2023-27

blocks.text: Standard ODI surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 250–290 runs par score.
Light drizzle · High 20°C / Low 16°C · Rain: 0.3 mm · Wind: up to 17 km/h. Light rain possible — overcast conditions could assist swing bowling early.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
